title: Mannitol
body_html:
Mannitol is an osmotic diuretic used in acute cerebral oedema. It should be avoided in congestive cardiac failure as it can cause fluid retention. It promotes the excretion of aspirin and barbiturates in overdose.

GI & general pharmacology
Mannitol is an osmotic diuretic used in acute cerebral oedema. It should be avoided in congestive cardiac failure as it can cause fluid retention. It promotes the excretion of aspirin and barbiturates in overdose.
